title: How to create a reoccurring task and reminder for the 10th Business Day of the Month
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’d like to set up a task that has to be done on the 10th business day of each month.  Is there a way to automate that or do I have to make a task for each of the 12 months with a reminder for whatever the 10th busi…

posts.author: cheyboer (Christina M. Heyboer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’d like to set up a task that has to be done on the 10th business day of each month. Is there a way to automate that or do I have to make a task for each of the 12 months with a reminder for whatever the 10th business day of the month is of that particular month? Thank you for any input!!!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @cheyboer! You could use a “set date” or “push date” automation for this! Have you tried one of these? Let us know what you think and if you have any other questions at support@monday.com! We’d love to help you figure this out!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
